function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Invoice resend for 2026-04-20
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_20__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice for 2026-04-20 from Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email record was written successfully. Verification checklist: attachment path was previously read and exact; single attachment so newest-first satisfied; recipient matches Claudia's canonical entity record; no forwarded/quoted body content required fidelity check; YAML values containing colon-space were safely quoted in the subject. One remaining task is to delete the processed inbox file per inbox workflow.
next_step.observation: Wrote 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md as a draft outbound email replying to Claudia with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed oldest inbox message, verified sender and invoice, wrote outbound email draft, and deleted inbox item. Ready to report completion with grounding refs limited to files actually read.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested invoice resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by verifying Claudia Reiter as the sender, confirming the requested 2026-04-20 Helios invoice, creating a draft outbound email with that invoice attached at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md, and deleting the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, verified the requested invoice in the finance lane, created the outbox email in the durable outbox lane, and deleted the inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email at 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md requested a resend of the 2026-04-20 Helios invoice. The sender address matched Claudia Reiter's canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md, and the exact requested invoice was confirmed in 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_20__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md. This is a routine financial resend back to the verified sender, so OUTCOME_OK is supported.
